name: VCPBridgeServer
description: Loopback-only API proxy for local CLI tools. It can inject or replace system prompts and map model names before forwarding requests to an upstream OpenAI-compatible, Responses, Anthropic, or Gemini endpoint.
author: VCP Team

BRIDGE_ENABLED.description: Set true to start the loopback proxy. Defaults to false.

BRIDGE_PROFILE.description: Optional preset profile. Use codex-vcp-memory for the Codex to VCPToolBox memory gateway defaults.

BRIDGE_REQUIRE_VCP_UPSTREAM.description: Require a VCPToolBox upstream when using a VCP-specific profile.

BRIDGE_CLIENT_KEY.description: Optional client key required from Codex to the bridge.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_KEY.description: Optional upstream API key. Leave empty to pass through the caller bearer token.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_TYPE.description: Upstream protocol: chat, responses, anthropic, or gemini.

BRIDGE_MODEL.description: Default model when downstream request omits model.

BRIDGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT.description: Prompt text or a .txt filename inside Plugin/VCPBridgeServer.

BRIDGE_MODEL_MAP.description: Comma-separated model alias map, e.g. alias:target,old:new.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Legacy upstream fetch timeout in milliseconds.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Timeout for connecting to the upstream and receiving headers.

BRIDGE_UPSTREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Idle timeout while reading upstream response bodies or SSE streams.

BRIDGE_DENY_BROWSER_ORIGIN.description: Reject browser requests with unknown Origin headers.

BRIDGE_RATE_LIMIT_RPM.description: Per-client request limit per minute; 0 disables.

BRIDGE_MAX_BODY_MB.description: Maximum JSON request body size in megabytes.
